flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Academy of Art University rose 55% between 2007 and 2010 ($6.1k → $9.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 44% at Academy of Art University vs the 2004–2008 baseline (4.1k vs 7.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Academy of Art University rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.4k → $30.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Academy of Art University rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.4k → $30.7k).
